summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated artifact covers 20 of 25 listed PRs; all hydrated PRs are open, non-security-sensitive, and independently scoped. No canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Five listed refs were not hydrated in the preflight artifact, so they are scoped needs_human items for refreshed hydration rather than closure or merge recommendations.
